title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 382.550 - Effective date — first filing date
text:
382.550.  Effective date — first filing date. — Sections 382.500 to 382.550 shall become effective January 1, 2016.  The first filing of ORSA summary reports shall be in 2016 in accordance with section 382.520.
(L. 2015 H.B. 50) 
Effective 1-01-16
